allow: Bash(docker run --rm --entrypoint sh hashicorp/terraform:latest -c "apk info | grep -i ssl; find /usr/lib /lib -name ''libssl*'' -o -name ''libcrypto*'' 2>/dev/null")
Bash(docker run --rm bt-provider-test sh -c 'ls -lh /usr/local/bin/terraform-provider-secretsafe 2>/dev/null || find / -name ""terraform-provider-secretsafe"" -ls 2>/dev/null | head -5')
Bash(docker run --rm --entrypoint sh bt-provider-test -c 'find / -name ""terraform-provider-secretsafe"" 2>/dev/null | xargs ls -lh 2>/dev/null')
